message:
🌱 Add tikv: Support online recovery for Raft majority failure mission (#770)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "tikv-10483-support-online-recovery-for-raft-majority-failure",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "tikv: Support online recovery for Raft majority failure",
+    "description": "Support online recovery for Raft majority failure. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current tikv deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your tiup --version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n tikv -l app.kubernetes.io/name=tikv\nhelm list -n tikv 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working tikv installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review tikv configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant tikv configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n tikv -l app.kubernetes.io/name=tikv\nkubectl get configmap -n tikv -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=tikv\n```\n## Development Task\n\nCurrently, we have a tool to recover Raft groups from majority failure:\n```\ntikv-ctl unsafe-recover remove-fail-stores -s <store_id, store_id> \u2026\ntikv-ctl recreate-region -r <region_id> ..."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support online recovery for Raft majority failure",
+        "description": "- Update the breakdown of the test, including benchmark the recovery time.\n- The prioritization follows the stage. Stage 2 is actually some subtasks of `force_leader`. \n- For the inconsistency fixing tool, let's discuss later. As expected, we won't be able to do them in this sprint.\n- For TiFlash\n```yaml\ntikv-ctl unsafe-recover remove-fail-stores -s <store_id, store_id> \u2026\ntikv-ctl recreate-region -r <region_id> ...\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n tikv -l app.kubernetes.io/name=tikv\nkubectl get events -n tikv --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support online recovery for Raft majority failure\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "- Update the breakdown of the test, including benchmark the recovery time.\n- The prioritization follows the stage. Stage 2 is actually some subtasks of `force_leader`. \n- For the inconsistency fixing tool, let's discuss later. As expected, we won't be able to do them in this sprint.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "tikv-ctl unsafe-recover remove-fail-stores -s <store_id, store_id> \u2026\ntikv-ctl recreate-region -r <region_id> ..."
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "tikv",
+      "graduated",

+      "feature"
+    ],
